title: Soni Pekhi
bodyText:
Leader of **the Shepherds** (education/healing/religion guild) and the Koviz clinic — the quest-giver behind the sickness arc. Early-40s human woman; white robe, brown-gold belt. Tired, competent, honest. Portrait: art/soni.png

# Current truth
- Sent the party to [[ms-judy|Ms. Judy]] (S03), then commissioned the real quest: **find and stop the source of [[the-sickness|the sickness]]** (S08), with the town's resources behind them.
- Coordinated the tincture distribution and house-to-house healer rounds; verified Judy's tincture bought ~a week (S07).
- Knows [[pc-varen|Varen]] a little from the library/schools.

# Threads
[[the-sickness]] · [[koviz]]
